item.title: The P-38 Ace Who Survived Nine Times
item.description: Discover the incredible story of a P-38 pilot who survived nine aerial battles. Courage, skill, and luck combined in this remarkable WWII aviation tale.

media:content.media:title: The P-38 Ace Who Survived Nine Times
media:content.media:description: Discover the incredible story of a P-38 pilot who survived nine aerial battles. Courage, skill, and luck combined in this remarkable WWII aviation tale.

item.title: A War Pilot Reveals Combat Flight Truths
item.description: A veteran war pilot shares the real experiences of combat flights. Hear firsthand accounts of danger, strategy, and life in the skies during intense missions.

media:content.media:title: A War Pilot Reveals Combat Flight Truths
media:content.media:description: A veteran war pilot shares the real experiences of combat flights. Hear firsthand accounts of danger, strategy, and life in the skies during intense missions.

item.title: The Beautiful End to My War in Europe
item.description: A veteran recounts the memorable and meaningful conclusion to their service in Europe. Reflections on courage, relief, and the moments that defined the war’s end.

media:content.media:title: The Beautiful End to My War in Europe
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts the memorable and meaningful conclusion to their service in Europe. Reflections on courage, relief, and the moments that defined the war’s end.

item.title: He Carried These Weapons Through Hell
item.description: A soldier’s story of bravery and endurance under fire. Discover the weapons he relied on and the harrowing battles he faced during intense combat.

media:content.media:title: He Carried These Weapons Through Hell
media:content.media:description: A soldier’s story of bravery and endurance under fire. Discover the weapons he relied on and the harrowing battles he faced during intense combat.

item.title: Miracle Plane: Full of Holes and Still Flying
item.description: A wartime plane riddled with holes managed to stay airborne. Witness the incredible story of survival, resilience, and the miracles of combat aviation.

media:content.media:title: Miracle Plane: Full of Holes and Still Flying
media:content.media:description: A wartime plane riddled with holes managed to stay airborne. Witness the incredible story of survival, resilience, and the miracles of combat aviation.

item.title: Robert Boeke: From Pearl Harbor to Recon
item.description: Robert “Bob” Boeke recounts enlisting in WWII, clearing mines in Normandy, and conducting dangerous reconnaissance missions. Hear his firsthand training and battlefield experiences.

media:content.media:title: Robert Boeke: From Pearl Harbor to Recon
media:content.media:description: Robert “Bob” Boeke recounts enlisting in WWII, clearing mines in Normandy, and conducting dangerous reconnaissance missions. Hear his firsthand training and battlefield experiences.

item.title: Bizarre Things I Saw in Fallujah
item.description: A veteran recounts the unusual and unexpected sights experienced in Fallujah. Stories from the frontlines reveal the strange, shocking, and surreal moments of combat.

media:content.media:title: Bizarre Things I Saw in Fallujah
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts the unusual and unexpected sights experienced in Fallujah. Stories from the frontlines reveal the strange, shocking, and surreal moments of combat.

item.title: The Day the World Stopped
item.description: A recounting of a historic moment that shook the world. Witness the events, reactions, and lasting impact of a day that changed history forever.

media:content.media:title: The Day the World Stopped
media:content.media:description: A recounting of a historic moment that shook the world. Witness the events, reactions, and lasting impact of a day that changed history forever.

item.title: How My Bayonet Wound Was Treated
item.description: A soldier shares the story of receiving and treating a bayonet wound in combat. Insights into battlefield medical care, recovery, and the realities of war injuries.

media:content.media:title: How My Bayonet Wound Was Treated
media:content.media:description: A soldier shares the story of receiving and treating a bayonet wound in combat. Insights into battlefield medical care, recovery, and the realities of war injuries.

item.title: The Unforgotten Faces of Black Hawk Down
item.description: Remember the soldiers behind the story of "Black Hawk Down." Personal accounts honor those who served, highlighting courage, sacrifice, and the human side of combat.

media:content.media:title: The Unforgotten Faces of Black Hawk Down
media:content.media:description: Remember the soldiers behind the story of "Black Hawk Down." Personal accounts honor those who served, highlighting courage, sacrifice, and the human side of combat.

item.title: Cudlitz on Portraying Sgt. “Bull” Randleman
item.description: Actor Cudlitz shares his experience portraying Sgt. Denver “Bull” Randleman in Band of Brothers, including insights from Randleman’s wife and their lasting connection.

media:content.media:title: Cudlitz on Portraying Sgt. “Bull” Randleman
media:content.media:description: Actor Cudlitz shares his experience portraying Sgt. Denver “Bull” Randleman in Band of Brothers, including insights from Randleman’s wife and their lasting connection.

item.title: The Unbelievable Noise of Battle
item.description: Experience the intense and overwhelming sounds of combat. Veterans describe the chaos, explosions, and constant noise that define life on the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: The Unbelievable Noise of Battle
media:content.media:description: Experience the intense and overwhelming sounds of combat. Veterans describe the chaos, explosions, and constant noise that define life on the battlefield.
